title: [ImportVerilog] Distinguish the index up or down on the range selection.

features.name: descending range selection on packed array
features.description: Code should include a descending range selection with the -: operator on a packed array, such as b[7-:8] to select bits [7:0]

features.name: variable width in range selection
features.description: Code should include a range selection with a variable width operand, such as b[7-:var_w] or b[7+:var_w], where the width is not a constant
